name: moza
description: Multi-identity credential router for Google, GitHub, Slack, Atlassian, Notion, AWS, and OCI — activate the right account in this shell without polluting global state.

interface.shortDescription: Switch identities for Google, GitHub, Slack, Atlassian, and Notion
interface.longDescription: Use moza to activate the right identity in this shell. Each profile bundles Google (Gmail/Calendar/Drive + GCP), GitHub, Slack workspaces, Atlassian, and Notion credentials. Credentials stay in your vault; the agent never sees raw tokens.
